note: worktree was dirty at task creation

Decision: changes_requested. Validation rerun evidence: cd apps/web && npm run build passed; cd apps/web && npm run lint exited 0 but emitted no-unused-vars warning for unused setupPortraitComparisonRoutes; Playwright initially failed in sandbox with EPERM on ::1:5175, then elevated reruns passed: portrait-comparison spec 4 passed/1 skipped, real API grep 1 passed; npm run guard:worktree passed; git diff --check clean; protected path checks clean. Blocking issue: frontend types/UI/E2E use invented DTOs instead of T0041 real backend contract. Backend ComparisonSummary has id/mode/similarityScore/coverage/qualityStatus/createdAt/baselineDisplayName/comparisonDisplayName only; frontend expects runSequence/archiveState/updatedAt/dimensionCount. Backend ComparisonDetail nests participant snapshot fields under baseline.source/comparison.source and uses comparisonContractVersion, algorithmId, dimensionEvidence, archiveEvents, baselineNormalizedValue/comparisonNormalizedValue/rawDelta/normalizedDelta/dimensionSimilarity/weightedContribution; frontend expects top-level baseline.snapshotId/dataVersion/periodStart, contractVersion, baselineValue/comparisonValue/delta/score, explanationOutcomes, archiveReason, runSequence. Real detail can therefore render undefined fields and DimensionTable can crash on undefined.toFixed(). Backend ArchiveComparisonOutput returns eventId/eventSequence/replayed/newState; frontend/test expect runId/newSequence. The VITE_USE_MOCK=false Playwright test proves USE_MOCK was bypassed but its page.route fixture still returns the frontend-invented shape, so it does not prove real backend compatibility. Also the task handoff says kilo-frontend memory was missing, but canonical /Users/huangbo/Dev/AgentOps/coding-system/agentops/memory/kilo-frontend.md exists; worker must read it. Required fix: align frontend types and adapter/UI with real T0041 DTOs or add explicit mapper from backend DTO to UI VM tested with backend-shaped intercept fixtures copied from apps/server/src/portrait-comparison/application/types.ts and route tests; update mock fixtures and VITE_USE_MOCK=false E2E to backend-shaped data; cover archive POST header/body including no runId in body, plus 404/409/not_released error envelopes; remove unused E2E helper or warning; update docs/notes-app and checklist execution fact; rerun required validations. Memory Used: Do not patch around Backend contract drift affected rejection decision; metadata updated to use_count 4. Promoted lesson: Real-contract Playwright intercepts must mirror the backend DTO, not frontend guesses.

Decision: changes_requested (revision 2). DTO drift from revision 1 is materially fixed: frontend types and backend-shaped E2E fixtures now align with T0041 ComparisonSummary/ComparisonDetail/ArchiveComparisonOutput, and no T0042 invented fields remain except readiness contractVersion which is real. Validation rerun evidence: cd apps/web && npm run build passed; cd apps/web && npm run lint clean; elevated cd apps/web && npx playwright test e2e/portrait-comparison.spec.ts passed 4/5 with 1 skipped in mock mode; elevated cd apps/web && VITE_USE_MOCK=false npx playwright test e2e/portrait-comparison.spec.ts --grep real API passed 1/1; npm run guard:worktree passed; git diff --check clean; protected path status/diff clean. Remaining blocker: archive/restore expectedSequence is wrong and untested. UI getLastArchiveSequence returns 0 for empty archiveEvents and passes that as expectedSequence, but backend application and HTTP contract require a positive next sequence: first archive expectedSequence=1, restore expectedSequence=2. Evidence: apps/server/src/portrait-comparison/application/comparison-application.ts validates expectedSequence >= 1 and compares to nextSequence; HTTP tests use expectedSequence 1 for first archive and 2 for restore. Therefore first archive from current UI will fail. E2E also does not click Archive/Restore or assert POST /api/v0/portrait-comparisons/:runId/archive request headers/body, and it does not cover the brief-required 404/409 error envelope UI. Required fix: compute next expected sequence as max archiveEvents eventSequence + 1 (empty => 1), use that in idempotency key and body; add backend-shaped Playwright coverage for archive POST with Idempotency-Key, body {operation, expectedCurrentState, expectedSequence, reason?} and no runId body field; cover stale 409 conflict and 404 detail/archive error envelope display; rerun required validations. Memory Used: Do not patch around Backend contract drift and Real-contract Playwright intercepts must mirror the backend DTO affected verification; metadata updated. Promoted lesson: Read-model sequence fields must be interpreted as next sequence, not last sequence. W08 remains planned and blocked; do not create next task.

Approved revision 3. Revision 1 DTO drift and revision 2 archive expectedSequence blockers are closed. Verified actual implementation: frontend DTOs align with T0041 backend ComparisonSummary/ComparisonDetail/ArchiveComparisonOutput; getNextExpectedSequence returns max archiveEvents.eventSequence + 1 and 1 for empty events; archive POST E2E asserts Idempotency-Key, operation, expectedCurrentState, expectedSequence=1, and no runId in body; 409 and 404 error envelope UI tests exist. Validation rerun evidence: cd apps/web && npm run build passed; cd apps/web && npm run lint clean; elevated cd apps/web && npx playwright test e2e/portrait-comparison.spec.ts passed 4/8 with 4 skipped in mock mode; elevated cd apps/web && VITE_USE_MOCK=false npx playwright test e2e/portrait-comparison.spec.ts passed 4/8 with 4 skipped in real-contract mode; npm run guard:worktree passed; git diff --check clean; protected path status/diff clean. Non-blocking risk recorded: test archive success response uses eventSequence expectedSequence+1 although backend returns nextSequence equal to expectedSequence for that request; current UI ignores that response and refreshes detail, so this is not a release blocker for W07. Memory Used: Do not patch around Backend contract drift, Real-contract Playwright intercepts must mirror backend DTO, and Read-model sequence fields must be interpreted as next sequence affected approval decision; metadata updated. W08 should now be created for full acceptance.
